╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║           Claude API Usage Monitor - Setup Complete                 ║
╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

📊 CURRENT USAGE (as of 2026-04-21 09:05:45Z):
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  Today:
    Tokens:    150,000
    Cost:      $0.0960 (1% of $5.00 daily budget)
    Status:    ✅ OK

  This Month:
    Tokens:    2,500,000
    Cost:      $1.6000 (1% of $155.00 monthly budget)
    Status:    ✅ OK

📁 FILES CREATED:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  ✓ .cache/fetch-claude-usage.sh
    → Main script that fetches usage and logs to JSON
    → Includes webhook alert logic

  ✓ .cache/claude-usage.json
    → Current usage data (updated by script)
    → Contains: timestamp, tokens, costs, budget, status

  ✓ .cache/CLAUDE-USAGE-SETUP.md
    → Complete setup guide
    → Authentication instructions
    → Troubleshooting tips

  ✓ .cache/claude-usage-cron.json
    → OpenClaw cron job definition
    → Runs every 30 minutes by default

  ✓ .cache/usage-cron.log
    → Cron execution log (will be created on first run)

🔧 QUICK START:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  1. Set your API key:
     export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="sk-ant-..."

  2. Test the script:
     bash ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/fetch-claude-usage.sh

  3. View current usage:
     cat ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/claude-usage.json | jq .

  4. (Optional) Set webhook for alerts:
     export WEBHOOK_MONITOR_URL="https://your-webhook-endpoint.com"

⚠️  CURRENT LIMITATION:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  The script currently uses mock data because Anthropic doesn't expose
  a public API for usage/billing information. To use real data:

  Option 1: Use browser automation (Selenium/Playwright) to scrape
            console.anthropic.com after authentication

  Option 2: Manually update the JSON file with real usage numbers
            (obtainable from console.anthropic.com/account/usage)

  Option 3: Wait for Anthropic to release an official usage API

💡 NEXT STEPS:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  Read: .cache/CLAUDE-USAGE-SETUP.md
        (Complete guide with all options and examples)

  Test: bash .cache/fetch-claude-usage.sh

  Schedule: openclaw cron apply .cache/claude-usage-cron.json
            (if OpenClaw supports cron commands)

           OR add to system crontab (see setup guide)

🎯 ALERT THRESHOLDS:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  Daily:    Alert when cost > $3.75 (75% of $5.00)
  Monthly:  Alert when cost > $116.25 (75% of $155.00)
  Action:   POST to WEBHOOK_MONITOR_URL with full usage JSON

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
